_comment: Entry tripwire(s), ONE per ENTRY-role camera. Key = the camera_id. p1/p2 = the two endpoints of a line drawn ACROSS the door threshold (just inside the glass so foot-points stay visible). inside_point = any pixel on the store-floor (inside) side - it tells the counter which crossing direction is an ENTRY vs an EXIT. min_frames_each_side = debounce (frames confirmed on each side before a crossing counts). Draw it in the Studio (entry cameras switch to tripwire mode) or with pipeline/calibrate.py --mode line.
